title: Ascendcraft
description:
Hi! Welcome to Ascendcraft.

This is a Vanilla+ Modpack hoping to enhance your experience without overstepping any major content boundaries.
body:
Welcome to Ascendcraft!

This is a small Modpack focusing on enhancing the users Minecraft experience by focusing solely on just that - the experience.

This was created by combining the wonderful "Fabulously Optimized" Modpack (Credit to robotkoer et. al) with a fairly large amount of handpicked mods, each of which enhance the game in their own unique ways.

I hope you enjoy this creation if you give it a try!

- AgentStormy44
